title: Aligning Knowledge Graphs and Language Models for Factual Accuracy
description:
Despite the promise of fine-tuning and RAG approaches, linearizing
KGs into text format often leads to a loss of structure information and is not
able to fully utilize the relational context[16], sometimes resulting in
irrelevant retrieved information to the question and ungrounded generated answer
with respect to the retrieved knowledge[3].

title: Controlling Context: Generative AI at Work in Integrated Circuit Design and Other High-Precision Domains
description:
■\blacksquare

Although hallucinations can be considered inherent characteristics of LLM
architectures[7], approaches have emerged that try to mitigate this phenomenon,
unacceptable in critical domains.
